title: Masterplast Heel Balm, Soften For Relief & Comfort, Ready To Use, 70G
features: Masterplast Heel Balm for softer, more comfortable feet. Fragrance free, ready to use, apply to hydrate and moisturise dry, cracked skin.
INTENSE MOISTURE: Extra strength, deep penetrating formula to provide moisture and comfort. Use regularly to maintain skin quality and soft heels
READY TO USE: Ensure feet are clean and dry before use. Massage into dry hard skin twice daily and continue treatment until the skin is smooth and repaired
PREVENTION: Use the cream to maintain skin texture, prevent the skin from hardening, cracking and causing discomfort
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Ready to use 70g tube
